name: Fajitas - Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak crosswise into 12 lengths.
2. Mix lime juice, oil, tequila, minced garlic, ground cumin, dried oregano, and ground pepper in a bowl to make a marinade.
3. Place the marinated meat and onion halves in the bowl; turn the mixture with the ingredients so everything is well coated. Let it marinate overnight or for at least 4 hours.
4. Pre-cook the onion halves until they are partly done.
5. Grill the onions and meat on an indoor or outdoor grill until the meat is rare to medium (do not overcook) and the onions are soft. Keep everything warm.
6. Heat the tortillas either on a grill or in a microwave until they are soft and warm.
7. Assemble each fajita by placing a slice of meat down the center of a warm tortilla, adding salsa, guacamole, sour cream, and cilantro (and any other garnishes). Fold up the bottom of the tortilla, then fold the sides up to enclose the filling. Eat out of hand.
